ddls:
CREATE TABLE "draws" (
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the draw */,
  "draw_number" TEXT /* Number or name of the draw */,
  "total_prize_fund" REAL /* Total prize fund amount for the draw */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners across all tiers for the draw */,
  "draw_status" TEXT /* Status of the draw (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "draw_type" TEXT /* Type of the draw (e.g., weekly, monthly, special) */,
  "announced_date" TEXT /* Date when the draw results were announced */,
  "estimated_prize_fund" REAL /* Estimated prize fund before the draw */,
  "actual_prize_fund" REAL /* Actual prize fund after the draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize tier */,
  "tier_description" TEXT /* Description of the prize tier */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Prize amount for the tier */,
  "number_of_matches" TEXT /* Number of main numbers matched to win the tier */,
  "euro_numbers" TEXT /* Number of Euro numbers matched to win the tier */,
  "tier_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize tier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (e.g., cash, non-cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draw_prize_tiers" (
  "draw_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draw-prize combination */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners for the prize tier in the draw */,
  "prize_fund_amount" REAL /* Total prize fund amount for the prize tier in the draw */,
  "draw_prize_status" TEXT /* Status of the draw-prize combination (e.g., awarded, pending) */,
  "estimated_winners" INTEGER /* Estimated number of winners for the tier */,
  "actual_winners" INTEGER /* Actual number of winners for the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draw_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_prize_tiers_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draw_prize_tiers_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw in which the winner won */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier won */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of prize won by the winner */,
  "winning_date" TEXT /* Date the winner won the prize */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the winner (e.g., Denmark, Sweden) */,
  "winner_status" TEXT /* Status of the winner (e.g., claimed, pending, invalid) */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was claimed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of prize payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "region_status" TEXT /* Status of the region (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., draw, winner, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, distribution, trends) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, published) */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize distribution */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of prize distributed */,
  "winners_count" INTEGER /* Number of winners for the prize tier in the region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize distribution (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "distribution_method" TEXT /* Method of distribution (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_distributions_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "draw_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draw */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize tier */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., prize payout, fund allocation) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_draw_id FOREIGN KEY ("draw_id") REFERENCES draws ("draw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES prize_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource affected by the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
